name: Ring of Blinking
description: This ring activates upon command, placing the wearer in a state of blinking (as the blink spell, CL 7) for up to 50 minutes per day. The duration need not be continuous.

name: Ring of Evasion
description: This ring continually grants the wearer the ability to avoid damage as if they had the evasion ability. When they successfully save against an attack that normally deals half damage on a successful save, they take no damage at all.

name: Ring of Freedom of Movement
description: This ring continually grants the wearer the freedom of movement as the spell (CL 7). The wearer can move and attack normally even under the influence of magic that impedes movement.

name: Robe of the Archmagi (White)
description: This robe is for good-aligned arcane spellcasters only. It grants a +5 armor bonus to AC, a +5 resistance bonus on all saves, and spell resistance 18.

name: Robe of the Archmagi (Black)
description: This robe is for evil-aligned arcane spellcasters only. It grants a +5 armor bonus to AC, a +5 resistance bonus on all saves, and spell resistance 18.

name: Scarab of Protection
description: If a character wearing this scarab is subject to a death spell, magical death effect, or energy drain, the scarab negates the effect. If the character is subject to a negative energy attack that would deal negative levels, the scarab drains one charge to negate a single negative level. The scarab has 12 charges when found. When all charges are gone, it becomes non-magical.

name: Vestments of the Celebrant
description: These priestly vestments are favored by clerics and paladins. They grant a +1 sacred bonus to AC and all saving throws. In addition, the wearer's channeled positive energy (turn undead or lay on hands) is maximized once per day without using a higher-level spell slot.

name: Vestments of the Druid
description: These green and brown robes grant a +2 enhancement bonus to Wisdom. The wearer's wild shape uses may be activated as a swift action rather than a standard action. In addition, when in wild shape, the wearer retains access to any druid vestment item abilities.
